nodes.name: Brush bronzewing
nodes.summary: Brush bronzewing（Brush bronzewing，学名 Phaps elegans），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括外来捕食者。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The brush bronzewing is listed as a species of Least Concern on the IUCN Red List and considered by BirdLife Australia to have secure populations in all states it occurs in. Like many other ground-dwelling bird species, the bronze brushwing is threatened by introduced predators such as cats and foxes
